name: Academic Calendar
overview: Morgan's Academic Calendar page is the official starting point for registration add drop withdrawal and term timing questions. The calendar is subject to change without notice.

name: Graduation Deadlines and Clearance Timeline
overview: Morgan's Graduation page is the official source for graduation application timing and clearance-cycle guidance including application deadlines and post-grade processing updates.

name: Applying for Graduation
overview: The Applying for Graduation page gives the official commencement-facing graduation application deadline for the current cycle and points students back to the academic calendar for confirmation.

name: Financial Aid Timeline
overview: Morgan's Financial Aid Timeline page is the official timing source for FAFSA processing award notifications and state scholarship priority timing. It includes the March 1 Morgan FAFSA priority date.

name: Financial Aid Applying for Aid
overview: The Applying for Aid page confirms Morgan's FAFSA priority date and is a safe official starting point for students asking about financial aid timing.

name: Application Deadlines
overview: Morgan's Application Deadlines page is the official source for undergraduate freshman and transfer application deadlines.
